votes.rationale: Ships Panels Operationalization v0: shared deterministic scorer (prevents CLI/UI drift), viewer scoring workflow (save breakdown + compute winner), and a clear completion signal surfaced in both Panels index and Registry Coverage.
Scope is bounded to .nexus panel artifacts with safe-id validation and atomic writes. Improves operator usability and auditability without adding model execution, network calls, or DB state.
Unanimous consent satisfied. Completion definition is explicit (winner != UNKNOWN and evidence commands present) and matches the new surfaces; proceed to ratify.
